summary: Completed testing of RICHSTOX news feed implementation. All requested features are working correctly: news from multiple tickers (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA), aggregate sentiment badge with Czech labels (Pozitivní/Negativní/Neutrální), individual news sentiment badges (↑/↓/–), and article modal functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: News feed implementation verified working. Backend fetches news for 5 default tickers (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA) in parallel from EODHD API. Frontend displays aggregate sentiment badge showing total sentiment score with Czech labels and individual news items show sentiment badges (↑ positive, ↓ negative, – neutral). Article modal opens with full content when clicking news items.

features_verified./api/homepage_endpoint: PASS - Returns benchmark data, popular stocks, market status
features_verified./api/news_multiple_tickers: PASS - Returns news for AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA (5 different companies)
features_verified.aggregate_sentiment_in_response: PASS - Response includes aggregate_sentiment with score, label, color, and counts
features_verified.dashboard_latest_news_section: PASS - 'Latest News' title and 'Real-time news from EODHD' subtitle visible
features_verified.individual_sentiment_badges: PASS - News items show sentiment badges (– for neutral visible)
features_verified.news_from_multiple_companies: PASS - All 5 tickers (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA) found in news feed
features_verified.article_modal: PASS - Opens on news item click, shows title, sentiment, tags, content, and 'Read original article' button
features_verified.load_more_news_api: PASS - Pagination works correctly (has_more: true/false, offset increments)
features_verified.news_item_structure: PASS - Each item has id, ticker, company_name, title, content, link, sentiment_label, time_ago

api_test_results./api/homepage: 200 OK - Returns benchmark data and popular stocks
api_test_results./api/news?offset=0&limit=10: 200 OK - Returns news from 5 tickers with aggregate_sentiment
api_test_results./api/news_pagination: PASS - offset=0,limit=5 returns has_more:true; offset=5,limit=5 returns has_more:false
